title: 我点了外卖
description_uz: «Qaysi ilova orqali buyurtma berding?» — Ikki do'st yetkazib berish haqida suhbatlashadi: qaysi ilova, nima buyurtma qilgani, qancha vaqtda kelishi, yetkazish haqi va kuryerdan olish. Bu dialog buyurtma berish, vaqt va narx haqida so'rash hamda taqqoslashni mashq qiladi. Kundalik hayotga oid amaliy so'zlarga boy. Tinglash va rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «В каком приложении ты заказывал?» — Двое друзей говорят о доставке: какое приложение, что заказали, за сколько привезут, плата за доставку и как забрать у курьера. Диалог тренирует оформление заказа, вопросы о времени и цене и сравнение. Богат практичной повседневной лексикой. Отлично подходит для аудирования и ролевой игры.
description_en: «Which app did you order it on?» — Two friends chat about food delivery: which app, what they ordered, how long it takes, the delivery fee, and picking it up from the courier. The dialogue practices placing an order, asking about time and price, and comparing. Rich in practical everyday vocabulary. Great for listening and role-play.

sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты сегодня ешь на обед?
sentences.text_translation_en: What are you having for lunch today?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ diǎn le wàimài, hái méi dào.
sentences.text_translation: Men yetkazib berishga buyurtma berdim, hali kelmadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я заказал доставку, ещё не привезли.
sentences.text_translation_en: I ordered delivery — it hasn't arrived yet.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zài nǎge ruǎnjiàn shàng diǎn de?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which app did you order it on?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Měituán, shàngmiàn yǒu hěn duō chī de.
sentences.text_translation_en: Meituan — it has lots of food on it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 一份牛肉面，还有一杯奶茶。
sentences.pinyin: Yí fèn niúròu miàn, hái yǒu yì bēi nǎichá.
sentences.text_translation: Bir porsiya mol go'shtli ugra, yana bir stakan sutli choy.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Порцию говяжьей лапши и стакан молочного чая.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bowl of beef noodles, plus a cup of milk tea.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: How long until the delivery arrives?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 大概三十分钟，软件上能看到。
sentences.pinyin: Dàgài sānshí fēnzhōng, ruǎnjiàn shàng néng kàndào.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan o'ttiz daqiqa, ilovada ko'rsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно тридцать минут, видно в приложении.
sentences.text_translation_en: About thirty minutes — you can see it in the app.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bú guì, yǒu shíhou hái miǎnfèi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive — sometimes it's even free.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wàimài dào le nǐ zěnme ná?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Когда доставку привезут, как ты её заберёшь?
sentences.text_translation_en: When the delivery arrives, how do you get it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 外卖员送到楼下，我下去拿。
sentences.pinyin: Wàimàiyuán sòngdào lóuxià, wǒ xiàqù ná.
sentences.text_translation: Kuryer pastga olib keladi, men tushib olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Курьер привозит вниз, я спускаюсь и забираю.
sentences.text_translation_en: The courier brings it downstairs, and I go down to get it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 外卖比去店里吃方便多了。
sentences.pinyin: Wàimài bǐ qù diàn lǐ chī fāngbiàn duō le.
sentences.text_translation: Yetkazib berish do'konga borib yeyishdan ancha qulay.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Доставка гораздо удобнее, чем идти есть в заведение.
sentences.text_translation_en: Delivery is much more convenient than going to eat at the restaurant.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊，下雨天我基本都点外卖。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a, xiàyǔ tiān wǒ jīběn dōu diǎn wàimài.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, yomg'irli kunlari men deyarli doim yetkazib berishga buyurtma beraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, в дождливые дни я почти всегда заказываю доставку.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, on rainy days I basically always order delivery.
sentences.speaker: B
